title: aconitum lycoctonum var. barbatum
intro: Aconitum lycoctonum var. barbatum, also known as bear's foot, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Aconitum genus. It is a perennial herb native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues, but its use requires caution due to its toxicity. In herbal preparations, bear's foot is often dried and processed into capsules or teas, but its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
